title: Licensing authority" defined
doc_html:
§1442.  "Licensing authority" defined

As used in the compact, the term "licensing authority" shall mean the Louisiana Department of Public Safety and Corrections, office of motor vehicles.

Acts 1991, No. 498, §1.
